'''Republica House''' was a building that housed the elite of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] including [[Cal Omas]]'s residence. At the building, [[Chief of State (Galactic Alliance)|Chief of State]] Omas was [[Solo-Niathal coup|arrested]] by [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], accompanied by Trooper [[Limm]] and [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Wirut]].

The Republica Building was built to replace the [[500 Republica/Legends|500 Republica]] after the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]].
